options: Commutation – It denotes the substitution of one form of punishment for a lighter form
Respite – It denotes awarding a lesser sentence in place of that which was originally awarded
Reprieve – It implies reducing the period of sentence without changing its character
Pardon – it removes both the sentences and the conviction
